final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a modern, clean, universally approachable aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center suitable for small display sizes
Subject: must include visual elements representing the three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle goods — balanced and harmonious in a single composition
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, energetic, and friendly atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet universally neutral direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and visually inoffensive across both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative or taboo connotations in any major culture
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, politically sensitive imagery, culturally specific taboo colors or gestures, human faces or portraits, and any brand-identifiable product designs
